CONTENT.Club career: Papela made his professional debut for Mainz 05 in the Bundesliga on 3 January 2021, coming on as a substitute in the 89th minute for Phillipp Mwene against Bayern Munich. The away match finished as a 5–2 loss.On 24 August 2022, Papela joined SV Sandhausen on a season-long loan.On 20 May 2024, Mainz 05 announced that Papela will leave the club after this season.On 26 June 2024, Papela signed with Darmstadt 98.
CONTENT.External links: Merveille Papela at DFB (also available in German)Merveille Papela at kicker (in German)Merveille Papela at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: Born in Germany, Papela is of Congolese descent. He has appeared for the Germany under-15 to under-18 and under-20 national teams. He was included in the Germany U17 team for the 2018 UEFA European Under-17 Championship in England. He made three appearances in the tournament, in which Germany were eliminated in the group stage.

SUMMARY: Matondo-Merveille Papela (born 18 January 2001) is a German footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for 2. Bundesliga club Darmstadt 98.
